role_problem: Designs, builds, and maintains scalable backend services that support core product functionality and ensure system reliability.
success_6_months: Independently delivers backend features, fixes production bugs, and contributes to system design discussions.
success_12_months: Owns major backend components, mentors junior developers, and improves system performance and reliability.
responsibilities: - Develop RESTful APIs for core product features
- Maintain and optimize existing backend services
- Collaborate with frontend and DevOps teams
performance_metrics: Feature delivery timelines, code quality, system uptime, and incident resolution speed.
dealbreakers: No production experience, inability to work collaboratively
